title: [EROBEAT] Shin Ringetsu - 01-02 [x264]
description:
[![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/146807-A755GJ7.jpg)](http://erobeat.hafio.net/home)  
  
This is the official thread for Erobeat fansub downloads.   
All series in this thread are unlicensed and subtitled in English.  
For any of our releases not listed in this thread, please visit [erobeat](http://erobeat.hafio.net) for more downloads.  
  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Deposit Files Workaround For Foreign Countries**  
  
Copy and paste the link [here](http://www.docoja.com/red/), and it will bypass any country restriction.  
  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Playback Help**  
  
All files are encoded in x264 format. If you are unable to play our files, please make sure you have the correct codecs installed. You can grab a codec pack like [CCCP](http://www.cccp-project.net) or [K-Lite](http://www.codecguide.com/download_kl.htm). Alternatively, you can use the [VideoLAN](http://www.videolan.org) player, but quality will suffer.  
  
All the files in this thread are 100% compatible with Xbox 360 and Playstation 3.  
![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/146808-VSI4FFZ.jpg)  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Important**  
  
In order for Erobeat to continue to bring you subtitled anime, we rely on revenue from direct downloads to help pay the translator. Please try to download our releases using this thread or our official homepage whenever possible. Without your support, we won't be able continue.  
  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Shin Ringetsu**  
  
![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/134618-U888FJQ.jpg)  
**Full Title:** Shin Ringetsu  
**Japanese Title:** 真・燐月  
**Label:** Milky  
**Number of Episodes:** 2  
**Filesize:** 233MB  
  
**Description:**  
A Long time ago, a curse was cast upon the Rindo family. The curse: the family could only give birth to girls. The only way to temporarily lift the curse was to have a child with someone from the Hizuki family. Once the curse was lifted, it would haunt the family again every 3rd generation. Many years have passed and now, Naoto Rindo will be the unfortunate one. His former fiancé from the Hizuki family has passed away due to a tragic accident, or so he thought...  
  
**Downloads:**  
Ep 1: [Filesonic](http://www.filesonic.com/file/2796434645/) [Fileserve](http://www.fileserve.com/file/vjfJg3P)   
Ep 2: [Filesonic](http://www.filesonic.com/file/2796434655/) [Fileserve](http://www.fileserve.com/file/qKM7NXn)

Redistributed by Calion-N

Content Synopsis:  
  
Though his name may mean good luck, Daikichi is far from lucky. Losing his home and his job, he narrowly avoids being homeless when he finds an old abandoned apartment building. But the apartment isn't nearly as abandoned as it first appeared, as it's being occupied by the ghost of a girl who committed suicide there many years prior. An ecchi romantic comedy from Tanaka Yutaka, mangaka of Ai-Ren.  
  
Note: Transferred from the normal section due to presence of ecchi. This manga is definitely not worksafe.  
  
Yet Another Note: This is a scanlated manga, courtesy of Solaris-SVU. If you prefer raws, I don't have them; you'll have better luck finding them elsewhere

title: [EROBEAT] Amy to Yobanaide - 01-02 [x264]
description:
[![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/146807-A755GJ7.jpg)](http://erobeat.hafio.net/home)  
  
This is the official thread for Erobeat fansub downloads.   
All series in this thread are unlicensed and subtitled in English.  
For any of our releases not listed in this thread, please visit [erobeat](http://erobeat.hafio.net) for more downloads.  
  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Deposit Files Workaround For Foreign Countries**  
  
Copy and paste the link [here](http://www.docoja.com/red/), and it will bypass any country restriction.  
  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Playback Help**  
  
All files are encoded in x264 format. If you are unable to play our files, please make sure you have the correct codecs installed. You can grab a codec pack like [CCCP](http://www.cccp-project.net) or [K-Lite](http://www.codecguide.com/download_kl.htm). Alternatively, you can use the [VideoLAN](http://www.videolan.org) player, but quality will suffer.  
  
All the files in this thread are 100% compatible with Xbox 360 and Playstation 3.  
![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/146808-VSI4FFZ.jpg)  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Important**  
  
In order for Erobeat to continue to bring you subtitled anime, we rely on revenue from direct downloads to help pay the translator. Please try to download our releases using this thread or our official homepage whenever possible. Without your support, we won't be able continue.  
  
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  
  
**Amy to Yobanaide**  
  
![Image](http://sadpanda.us/images/138105-21CUD5V.jpg)  
**Full Title:** Amy to Yobanaide  
**Japanese Title:** エイミーと呼ばないでっ  
**Official Title:** Amy's Fantasies  
**Unofficial Title:** Don't Call Me Amy  
**Label:** Pink Pineapple  
**Number of Episodes:** 2  
**Filesize:** 233MB  
  
**Description:**  
Emi is a high-school girl with a very strong love for her younger step-brother. She finally decides that it is time to confess her love to him, since it is near her 18th birthday. But, before the climactic moment where she can confess your love, debt collectors arrive to confiscate her fathers properties.

title: [BDISO] The Girl Who Leapt Through Time [時をかける少女] original iso
description:
\[imghttp://img7.anidb.net/pics/anime/12213.jpg\[/img\]  
  
Девочка, покорившая время  
Toki o Kakeru Shoujo  
The Girl Who Leapt Through Time  
時をかける少女  
Das Mädchen, das durch die Zeit sprang  
La Ragazza che Saltava nel Tempo  
La traversée du temps  
O dziewczynie skaczącej przez czas  
O dívce, která proskočila časem  
Putovanje kroz vrijeme  
Tüdruk, kes hüppas läbi aja  
  
У старшеклассницы Макото не задался день: контрольная написана скверно, на уроке домоводства сгорела темпура, на перемене ее сшибли с ног; после уроков она относила анкеты и растянулась в лаборатории. И, в качестве эффектного завершения дня, у Макото отказал тормоз на велосипеде, причем выяснилось это как раз на железнодорожном переезде, когда поезд уже подходил... Если бы этот день пошел как-то иначе! Если бы можно было хоть что-то переиграть!..  
  
...а, как известно, девочки в этом возрасте часто прыгают во времени...  
  
© [Анастасия Розанова](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/animation.php?id=5822), World Art  
  
Life for 17-year-old Konno Makoto is filled with fun days of school and hanging out with her two best friends, Chiaki and Kousuke. And then she finds herself with a strange ability to leap (or jump) back in time. A strange ability that at first saves her life, but then allows her to not be late to school, to know the answers on any surprise exams and to avoid any troublesome mishaps. It is only when Makoto chooses to use this ability to avoid some of the more personal issues that arise with her friends, do events become both complex and painfully difficult - the simple gift that she once took for granted suddenly becomes a troublesome burden.  
  
Winner 6th Annual Tokyo Anime Awards (2007) – Anime Movie  
2006 Winner of Mainichi Award (Oofuji Noburou Award)
